message:
refactor(lab,io_driver): add IoRequested tracing and improve network sim precision

Lab runtime and I/O driver refinements:

- src/lab/runtime.rs: Track seen I/O tokens via HashSet and emit
  IoRequested trace events on first observation. The turn_with callback
  now receives both the Event and its registered Interest, enabling
  richer trace output for deterministic replay.

- src/runtime/io_driver.rs: Add interests HashMap to track Interest
  sets per registered token. turn_with callback signature changed from
  FnMut(&Event) to FnMut(&Event, Option<Interest>) to pass registered
  interest alongside readiness events.

- src/lab/network/config.rs: Add doc comments to all LatencyModel and
  JitterModel variant fields. Fix RNG precision by shifting to
  (next_u64() >> 11) / 2^53 for uniform [0,1) sampling. Use mul_add
  for Normal distribution sampling. Add clippy allow attributes.

- src/lab/network/network.rs: Add doc comments to Packet, Fault,
  NetworkMetrics, and NetworkTraceEvent fields. Refactor delivery
  logic to avoid redundant drop(host). Use map_or for Option chains.
  Fix should_drop() RNG precision to match config.rs.

- tests/lab_network.rs: Add module doc comment. Use contains() range
  check instead of manual && comparison.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
